languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

languages.text: "Хе, да уж, тот еще балабол! Может у пузатого господина тоже в голове голосочки? Уверена, что мои друзья из-за дверки с радостью составят им компанию".

traits.locale_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the pot-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."
"Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the pot-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."
"Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the pot-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

languages.text: 「ああ、彼は確かに大しゃべりだ！もしかして、おなかが張った主人も頭の中で声が聞こえるのかもしれないね？ドアの向こうの友達は、彼らといつか一緒に集まるのが大好きだと思うわ」
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the pot-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

languages.text: "Ha, er ist wirklich ziemlich geschwätzig! Vielleicht hört sein ritzelbäuchiger Meister in seinem Kopf ja auch Stimmen? Ich bin sicher, meine Freunde jenseits der Tür würden sich gerne mit ihnen unterhalten."
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, er ist wirklich ziemlich geschwätzig! Vielleicht hört sein ritzelbäuchiger Meister in seinem Kopf ja auch Stimmen? Ich bin sicher, meine Freunde jenseits der Tür würden sich gerne mit ihnen unterhalten."

languages.text: «¡Ya lo creo, está hecho un parlanchín! ¿Acaso este clérigo de mecánica panza también oye voces en su cabeza? Seguro que a mis amigos del otro lado del umbral les encantaría charlar con ellas en alguna ocasión».
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ya lo creo, está hecho un parlanchín! ¿Acaso este clérigo de mecánica panza también oye voces en su cabeza? Seguro que a mis amigos del otro lado del umbral les encantaría charlar con ellas en alguna ocasión».

languages.text: "Tam bir geveze olduğu kesin! Belki dişli göbekli usta da kafasında sesler duyuyordur? Kapının ötesindeki arkadaşlarımın onlarla bir ara bir araya gelmekten hoşlanacağına eminim."
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

traits.locale_text: "Tam bir geveze olduğu kesin! Belki dişli göbekli usta da kafasında sesler duyuyordur? Kapının ötesindeki arkadaşlarımın onlarla bir ara bir araya gelmekten hoşlanacağına eminim."

languages.text: « Ha, quel grand bavard, en effet ! Son maître bedonnant entendrait-il des voix dans sa tête, par hasard ? Mes amis par-delà la porte seraient très certainement ravis de les rencontrer un jour. »
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."

traits.locale_text: « Ha, quel grand bavard, en effet ! Son maître bedonnant entendrait-il des voix dans sa tête, par hasard ? Mes amis par-delà la porte seraient très certainement ravis de les rencontrer un jour. »

languages.text: “哈，他可真是个话痨！或许这位大腹便便的大师，脑子里也能听见声音？我敢肯定，我那些‘门外的朋友’会很乐意找个时间跟他们聚一聚。”
languages.original_text: "Ha, he's quite the gabbler, all right! Maybe the cog-bellied master hears voices in his head, too? I'm sure my friends from beyond the door would love to get together with them sometime."
